mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId1} AND to_user_id = #{userId2}) OR (from_user_id = #{userId2} AND to_user_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (from_user_id, to_user_id, content, msg_type, house_id, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{houseId}, #{isRead}, NOW())
